productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Team Training Black Waist Pouch
description: Style note This waist pouch from nike easily balances the fine line between sport and style with its simple design. Wear this for a road trip, trek into the woods or during a long run to keep your belongings secure and accessible. Product Details Black waist pouch with printed branding Three zippered slots on the sides and back A fabric waist strap with a click lock Material and Care Nylon, polyester only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry do not iron Size Height: 15 cm Width: 36 cm Depth: 5 cm
